file_id.comment: Must be first message in file.

fields.name: time_created
fields.comment: Only set for files that are can be created/erased.

fields.name: number
fields.comment: Only set for files that are not created/erased.

fields.name: product_name
fields.comment: Optional free form string to indicate the devices name or model

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Whole second part of UTC timestamp at the time the system timestamp was recorded.

fields.name: fractional_timestamp
fields.comment: Fractional part of the UTC timestamp at the time the system timestamp was recorded.

fields.name: system_timestamp
fields.comment: Whole second part of the system timestamp

fields.name: fractional_system_timestamp
fields.comment: Fractional part of the system timestamp

fields.name: local_timestamp
fields.comment: timestamp epoch expressed in local time used to convert timestamps to local time

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Millisecond part of the UTC timestamp at the time the system timestamp was recorded.

fields.name: system_timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Millisecond part of the system timestamp

fields.name: languages
fields.comment: Use language_bits_x types where x is index of array.

fields.name: sports
fields.comment: Use sport_bits_x types where x is index of array.

fields.name: active_time_zone
fields.comment: Index into time zone arrays.

fields.name: utc_offset
fields.comment: Offset from system time. Required to convert timestamp from system time to UTC.

fields.name: time_offset
fields.comment: Offset from system time.

fields.name: time_mode
fields.comment: Display mode for the time

fields.name: time_zone_offset
fields.comment: timezone offset in 1/4 hour increments

fields.name: backlight_mode
fields.comment: Mode for backlight

fields.name: activity_tracker_enabled
fields.comment: Enabled state of the activity tracker functionality

fields.name: clock_time
fields.comment: UTC timestamp used to set the devices clock and date

fields.name: pages_enabled
fields.comment: Bitfield to configure enabled screens for each supported loop

fields.name: move_alert_enabled
fields.comment: Enabled state of the move alert

fields.name: date_mode
fields.comment: Display mode for the date

fields.name: default_page
fields.comment: Bitfield to indicate one page as default for each supported loop

fields.name: autosync_min_steps
fields.comment: Minimum steps before an autosync can occur

fields.name: autosync_min_time
fields.comment: Minimum minutes before an autosync can occur

fields.name: lactate_threshold_autodetect_enabled
fields.comment: Enable auto-detect setting for the lactate threshold feature.

fields.name: ble_auto_upload_enabled
fields.comment: Automatically upload using BLE

fields.name: auto_sync_frequency
fields.comment: Helps to conserve battery by changing modes

fields.name: auto_activity_detect
fields.comment: Allows setting specific activities auto-activity detect enabled/disabled settings

fields.name: number_of_screens
fields.comment: Number of screens configured to display

fields.name: smart_notification_display_orientation
fields.comment: Smart Notification display orientation

fields.name: tap_sensitivity
fields.comment: Used to hold the tap threshold setting

fields.name: friendly_name
fields.comment: Used for Morning Report greeting

fields.name: wake_time
fields.comment: Typical wake time

fields.name: sleep_time
fields.comment: Typical bed time

fields.name: user_running_step_length
fields.comment: User defined running step length set to 0 for auto length

fields.name: user_walking_step_length
fields.comment: User defined walking step length set to 0 for auto length

fields.name: speed_source
fields.comment: Use footpod for speed source instead of GPS

fields.name: odometer_rollover
fields.comment: Rollover counter that can be used to extend the odometer

fields.name: odometer_rollover
fields.comment: Rollover counter that can be used to extend the odometer

fields.name: front_gear_num
fields.comment: Number of front gears

fields.name: front_gear
fields.comment: Number of teeth on each gear 0 is innermost

fields.name: rear_gear_num
fields.comment: Number of rear gears

fields.name: rear_gear
fields.comment: Number of teeth on each gear 0 is innermost

fields.name: bluetooth_enabled
fields.comment: Use Bluetooth for connectivity features

fields.name: bluetooth_le_enabled
fields.comment: Use Bluetooth Low Energy for connectivity features

fields.name: ant_enabled
fields.comment: Use ANT for connectivity features

fields.name: precise_target_speed
fields.comment: A more precise target speed field

fields.name: water_density
fields.comment: Fresh water is usually 1000; salt water is usually 1025

fields.name: po2_warn
fields.comment: Typically 1.40

fields.name: po2_critical
fields.comment: Typically 1.60

fields.name: repeat_dive_interval
fields.comment: Time between surfacing and ending the activity

fields.name: safety_stop_time
fields.comment: Time at safety stop (if enabled)

fields.name: travel_gas
fields.comment: Index of travel dive_gas message

fields.name: ccr_low_setpoint_switch_mode
fields.comment: If low PO2 should be switched to automatically

fields.name: ccr_low_setpoint
fields.comment: Target PO2 when using low setpoint

fields.name: ccr_low_setpoint_depth
fields.comment: Depth to switch to low setpoint in automatic mode

fields.name: ccr_high_setpoint_switch_mode
fields.comment: If high PO2 should be switched to automatically

fields.name: ccr_high_setpoint
fields.comment: Target PO2 when using high setpoint

fields.name: ccr_high_setpoint_depth
fields.comment: Depth to switch to high setpoint in automatic mode

fields.name: gas_consumption_display
fields.comment: Type of gas consumption rate to display. Some values are only valid if tank volume is known.

fields.name: up_key_enabled
fields.comment: Indicates whether the up key is enabled during dives

fields.name: dive_sounds
fields.comment: Sounds and vibration enabled or disabled in-dive

fields.name: last_stop_multiple
fields.comment: Usually 1.0/1.5/2.0 representing 3/4.5/6m or 10/15/20ft

fields.name: no_fly_time_mode
fields.comment: Indicates which guidelines to use for no-fly surface interval.

fields.name: message_index
fields.comment: Index of the alarm

fields.name: depth
fields.comment: Depth setting (m) for depth type alarms

fields.name: time
fields.comment: Time setting (s) for time type alarms

fields.name: enabled
fields.comment: Enablement flag

fields.name: alarm_type
fields.comment: Alarm type setting

fields.name: sound
fields.comment: Tone and Vibe setting for the alarm

fields.name: dive_types
fields.comment: Dive types the alarm will trigger on

fields.name: id
fields.comment: Alarm ID

fields.name: popup_enabled
fields.comment: Show a visible pop-up for this alarm

fields.name: trigger_on_descent
fields.comment: Trigger the alarm on descent

fields.name: trigger_on_ascent
fields.comment: Trigger the alarm on ascent

fields.name: repeating
fields.comment: Repeat alarm each time threshold is crossed?

fields.name: speed
fields.comment: Ascent/descent rate (mps) setting for speed type alarms

fields.name: total_timer_time
fields.comment: Timer Time (excludes pauses)

fields.comment: total_distance / total_timer_time

fields.comment: average heart rate (excludes pause time)

fields.name: avg_power
fields.comment: total_power / total_timer_time if non_zero_avg_power otherwise total_power / total_elapsed_time

fields.name: nec_long
fields.comment: North east corner longitude

fields.name: surface_interval
fields.comment: Time since end of last dive

fields.name: total_grit
fields.comment: The grit score estimates how challenging a route could be for a cyclist in terms of time spent going over sharp turns or large grade slopes.

fields.name: total_flow
fields.comment: The flow score estimates how long distance wise a cyclist deaccelerates over intervals where deacceleration is unnecessary such as smooth turns or small grade angle intervals.

fields.comment: The flow score estimates how long distance wise a cyclist deaccelerates over intervals where deacceleration is unnecessary such as smooth turns or small grade angle intervals.

fields.name: workout_feel
fields.comment: A 0-100 scale representing how a user felt while performing a workout. Low values are considered feeling bad, while high values are good.

fields.name: workout_rpe
fields.comment: Common Borg CR10 / 0-10 RPE scale, multiplied 10x.. Aggregate score for all workouts in a single session.

fields.comment: Root mean square successive difference (RMSSD) - Heart rate variability measure most useful for athletes

subFields.name: radar_threat_alert
subFields.comment: The first byte is the radar_threat_level_max, the second byte is the radar_threat_count, third bytes is the average approach speed, and the 4th byte is the max approach speed

fields.name: score
fields.comment: Do not populate directly. Autogenerated by decoder for sport_point subfield components

fields.name: opponent_score
fields.comment: Do not populate directly. Autogenerated by decoder for sport_point subfield components

fields.name: front_gear_num
fields.comment: Do not populate directly. Autogenerated by decoder for gear_change subfield components. Front gear number. 1 is innermost.

fields.name: front_gear
fields.comment: Do not populate directly. Autogenerated by decoder for gear_change subfield components. Number of front teeth.

fields.name: rear_gear_num
fields.comment: Do not populate directly. Autogenerated by decoder for gear_change subfield components. Rear gear number. 1 is innermost.

fields.name: rear_gear
fields.comment: Do not populate directly. Autogenerated by decoder for gear_change subfield components. Number of rear teeth.

fields.name: activity_type
fields.comment: Activity Type associated with an auto_activity_detect event

fields.name: start_timestamp
fields.comment: Timestamp of when the event started

fields.name: radar_threat_level_max
fields.comment: Do not populate directly. Autogenerated by decoder for threat_alert subfield components.

fields.name: radar_threat_count
fields.comment: Do not populate directly. Autogenerated by decoder for threat_alert subfield components.

fields.name: radar_threat_avg_approach_speed
fields.comment: Do not populate directly. Autogenerated by decoder for radar_threat_alert subfield components

fields.name: radar_threat_max_approach_speed
fields.comment: Do not populate directly. Autogenerated by decoder for radar_threat_alert subfield components

fields.name: cum_operating_time
fields.comment: Reset by new battery or charge.

fields.name: sensor_position
fields.comment: Indicates the location of the sensor

fields.name: descriptor
fields.comment: Used to describe the sensor or location

fields.name: product_name
fields.comment: Optional free form string to indicate the devices name or model

training_file.comment: Corresponds to file_id of workout or course.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: time of update for current conditions, else forecast time

fields.name: weather_report
fields.comment: Current or forecast

fields.name: condition
fields.comment: Corresponds to GSC Response weatherIcon field

fields.name: precipitation_probability
fields.comment: range 0-100

fields.name: temperature_feels_like
fields.comment: Heat Index if GCS heatIdx above or equal to 90F or wind chill if GCS windChill below or equal to 32F

fields.name: location
fields.comment: string corresponding to GCS response location string

fields.name: report_id
fields.comment: Unique identifier from GCS report ID string, length is 12

fields.name: issue_time
fields.comment: Time alert was issued

fields.name: expire_time
fields.comment: Time alert expires

fields.name: severity
fields.comment: Warning, Watch, Advisory, Statement

fields.name: type
fields.comment: Tornado, Severe Thunderstorm, etc.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Whole second part of the timestamp.

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Millisecond part of the timestamp.

fields.name: utc_timestamp
fields.comment: Used to correlate UTC to system time if the timestamp of the message is in system time. This UTC time is derived from the GPS data.

fields.name: velocity
fields.comment: velocity[0] is lon velocity. Velocity[1] is lat velocity. Velocity[2] is altitude velocity.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Whole second part of the timestamp.

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Millisecond part of the timestamp.

fields.comment: Whole second part of the timestamp

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Millisecond part of the timestamp.

fields.name: sample_time_offset
fields.comment: Each time in the array describes the time at which the gyro sample with the corrosponding index was taken. Limited to 30 samples in each message. The samples may span across seconds. Array size must match the number of samples in gyro_x and gyro_y and gyro_z

fields.name: gyro_x
fields.comment: These are the raw ADC reading. Maximum number of samples is 30 in each message. The samples may span across seconds. A conversion will need to be done on this data once read.

fields.name: gyro_y
fields.comment: These are the raw ADC reading. Maximum number of samples is 30 in each message. The samples may span across seconds. A conversion will need to be done on this data once read.

fields.name: gyro_z
fields.comment: These are the raw ADC reading. Maximum number of samples is 30 in each message. The samples may span across seconds. A conversion will need to be done on this data once read.

fields.name: calibrated_gyro_x
fields.comment: Calibrated gyro reading

fields.name: calibrated_gyro_y
fields.comment: Calibrated gyro reading

fields.name: calibrated_gyro_z
fields.comment: Calibrated gyro reading

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Whole second part of the timestamp

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Millisecond part of the timestamp.

fields.name: sample_time_offset
fields.comment: Each time in the array describes the time at which the accelerometer sample with the corrosponding index was taken. Limited to 30 samples in each message. The samples may span across seconds. Array size must match the number of samples in accel_x and accel_y and accel_z

fields.name: accel_x
fields.comment: These are the raw ADC reading. Maximum number of samples is 30 in each message. The samples may span across seconds. A conversion will need to be done on this data once read.

fields.name: accel_y
fields.comment: These are the raw ADC reading. Maximum number of samples is 30 in each message. The samples may span across seconds. A conversion will need to be done on this data once read.

fields.name: accel_z
fields.comment: These are the raw ADC reading. Maximum number of samples is 30 in each message. The samples may span across seconds. A conversion will need to be done on this data once read.

fields.name: compressed_calibrated_accel_z
fields.comment: Calibrated accel reading

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Whole second part of the timestamp

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Millisecond part of the timestamp.

fields.name: sample_time_offset
fields.comment: Each time in the array describes the time at which the compass sample with the corrosponding index was taken. Limited to 30 samples in each message. The samples may span across seconds. Array size must match the number of samples in cmps_x and cmps_y and cmps_z

fields.name: mag_x

fields.name: mag_y

fields.comment: Calibrated Magnetometer reading

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Whole second part of the timestamp

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Millisecond part of the timestamp.

fields.name: sample_time_offset
fields.comment: Each time in the array describes the time at which the barometer sample with the corrosponding index was taken. The samples may span across seconds. Array size must match the number of samples in baro_cal

fields.name: baro_pres
fields.comment: These are the raw ADC reading. The samples may span across seconds. A conversion will need to be done on this data once read.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Whole second part of the timestamp

fields.name: sensor_type
fields.comment: Indicates which sensor the calibration is for

fields.name: calibration_factor
fields.comment: Calibration factor used to convert from raw ADC value to degrees, g, etc.

fields.name: calibration_divisor
fields.comment: Calibration factor divisor

fields.name: level_shift
fields.comment: Level shift value used to shift the ADC value back into range

fields.name: offset_cal
fields.comment: Internal calibration factors, one for each: xy, yx, zx

fields.name: orientation_matrix
fields.comment: 3 x 3 rotation matrix (row major)

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Whole second part of the timestamp

fields.name: sensor_type
fields.comment: Indicates which sensor the calibration is for

fields.name: calibration_factor
fields.comment: Calibration factor used to convert from raw ADC value to degrees, g, etc.

fields.name: calibration_divisor
fields.comment: Calibration factor divisor

fields.name: level_shift
fields.comment: Level shift value used to shift the ADC value back into range

fields.name: offset_cal
fields.comment: Internal Calibration factor

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Whole second part of the timestamp

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Millisecond part of the timestamp.

fields.name: frame_number
fields.comment: Number of the frame that the timestamp and timestamp_ms correlate to

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Timestamp message was output

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Fractional part of timestamp, added to timestamp

fields.name: time_offset
fields.comment: Offset of PID reading [i] from start_timestamp+start_timestamp_ms. Readings may span accross seconds.

fields.name: pid
fields.comment: Parameter ID

fields.name: raw_data
fields.comment: Raw parameter data

fields.name: pid_data_size
fields.comment: Optional, data size of PID[i]. If not specified refer to SAE J1979.

fields.name: system_time
fields.comment: System time associated with sample expressed in ms, can be used instead of time_offset. There will be a system_time value for each raw_data element. For multibyte pids the system_time is repeated.

fields.name: start_timestamp
fields.comment: Timestamp of first sample recorded in the message. Used with time_offset to generate time of each sample

fields.name: start_timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Fractional part of start_timestamp

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Timestamp message was output

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Fractional part of timestamp, added to timestamp

fields.name: sentence
fields.comment: NMEA sentence

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Timestamp message was output

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Fractional part of timestamp, added to timestamp

fields.name: system_time
fields.comment: System time associated with sample expressed in ms.

fields.name: pitch
fields.comment: Range -PI/2 to +PI/2

fields.name: roll
fields.comment: Range -PI to +PI

fields.name: accel_lateral
fields.comment: Range -78.4 to +78.4 (-8 Gs to 8 Gs)

fields.name: accel_normal
fields.comment: Range -78.4 to +78.4 (-8 Gs to 8 Gs)

fields.name: turn_rate
fields.comment: Range -8.727 to +8.727 (-500 degs/sec to +500 degs/sec)

fields.name: attitude_stage_complete
fields.comment: The percent complete of the current attitude stage. Set to 0 for attitude stages 0, 1 and 2 and to 100 for attitude stage 3 by AHRS modules that do not support it. Range - 100

fields.name: track
fields.comment: Track Angle/Heading Range 0 - 2pi

fields.name: duration
fields.comment: Playback time of video

fields.name: message_index
fields.comment: Long titles will be split into multiple parts

fields.name: message_count
fields.comment: Total number of title parts

fields.name: message_index
fields.comment: Long descriptions will be split into multiple parts

fields.name: message_count
fields.comment: Total number of description parts

fields.name: clip_start
fields.comment: Start of clip in video time

fields.name: clip_end
fields.comment: End of clip in video time

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Timestamp of the set

fields.name: repetitions
fields.comment: # of repitions of the movement

fields.name: weight
fields.comment: Amount of weight applied for the set

fields.name: start_time
fields.comment: Start time of the set

fields.name: category_subtype
fields.comment: Based on the associated category, see [category]_exercise_names

fields.name: score
fields.comment: A score for a jump calculated based on hang time, rotations, and distance.

field_description.comment: Must be logged before developer field is used

developer_data_id.comment: Must be logged before field description

segment_id.comment: Unique Identification data for a segment file

fields.name: name
fields.comment: Friendly name assigned to segment

fields.name: uuid
fields.comment: UUID of the segment

fields.name: sport
fields.comment: Sport associated with the segment

fields.name: enabled
fields.comment: Segment enabled for evaluation

fields.name: user_profile_primary_key
fields.comment: Primary key of the user that created the segment

fields.name: device_id
fields.comment: ID of the device that created the segment

fields.name: default_race_leader
fields.comment: Index for the Leader Board entry selected as the default race participant

fields.name: delete_status
fields.comment: Indicates if any segments should be deleted

fields.name: selection_type
fields.comment: Indicates how the segment was selected to be sent to the device

segment_leaderboard_entry.comment: Unique Identification data for an individual segment leader within a segment file

fields.name: name
fields.comment: Friendly name assigned to leader

fields.name: type
fields.comment: Leader classification

fields.name: group_primary_key
fields.comment: Primary user ID of this leader

fields.name: activity_id
fields.comment: ID of the activity associated with this leader time

fields.name: segment_time
fields.comment: Segment Time (includes pauses)

fields.name: activity_id_string
fields.comment: String version of the activity_id. 21 characters long, express in decimal

segment_point.comment: Navigation and race evaluation point for a segment decribing a point along the segment path and time it took each segment leader to reach that point

fields.name: distance
fields.comment: Accumulated distance along the segment at the described point

fields.name: altitude
fields.comment: Accumulated altitude along the segment at the described point

fields.name: leader_time
fields.comment: Accumualted time each leader board member required to reach the described point. This value is zero for all leader board members at the starting point of the segment.

fields.name: enhanced_altitude
fields.comment: Accumulated altitude along the segment at the described point

fields.name: total_elapsed_time
fields.comment: Time (includes pauses)

fields.name: total_timer_time
fields.comment: Timer Time (excludes pauses)

fields.name: total_fat_calories
fields.comment: If New Leaf

fields.name: avg_cadence
fields.comment: total_cycles / total_timer_time if non_zero_avg_cadence otherwise total_cycles / total_elapsed_time

fields.name: avg_power
fields.comment: total_power / total_timer_time if non_zero_avg_power otherwise total_power / total_elapsed_time

fields.name: nec_lat
fields.comment: North east corner latitude.

fields.name: nec_long
fields.comment: North east corner longitude.

fields.name: swc_lat
fields.comment: South west corner latitude.

fields.name: swc_long
fields.comment: South west corner latitude.

fields.name: avg_fractional_cadence
fields.comment: fractional part of the avg_cadence

fields.name: max_fractional_cadence
fields.comment: fractional part of the max_cadence

fields.name: total_fractional_cycles
fields.comment: fractional part of the total_cycles

fields.name: time_standing
fields.comment: Total time spent in the standing position

fields.name: stand_count
fields.comment: Number of transitions to the standing state

fields.name: avg_left_pco
fields.comment: Average left platform center offset

fields.name: avg_right_pco
fields.comment: Average right platform center offset

fields.name: avg_left_power_phase
fields.comment: Average left power phase angles. Data value indexes defined by power_phase_type.

fields.name: avg_left_power_phase_peak
fields.comment: Average left power phase peak angles. Data value indexes defined by power_phase_type.

fields.name: avg_right_power_phase
fields.comment: Average right power phase angles. Data value indexes defined by power_phase_type.

fields.name: avg_right_power_phase_peak
fields.comment: Average right power phase peak angles. Data value indexes defined by power_phase_type.

fields.name: avg_power_position
fields.comment: Average power by position. Data value indexes defined by rider_position_type.

fields.name: max_power_position
fields.comment: Maximum power by position. Data value indexes defined by rider_position_type.

fields.name: avg_cadence_position
fields.comment: Average cadence by position. Data value indexes defined by rider_position_type.

fields.name: max_cadence_position
fields.comment: Maximum cadence by position. Data value indexes defined by rider_position_type.

fields.name: manufacturer
fields.comment: Manufacturer that produced the segment

fields.name: total_grit
fields.comment: The grit score estimates how challenging a route could be for a cyclist in terms of time spent going over sharp turns or large grade slopes.

fields.name: total_flow
fields.comment: The flow score estimates how long distance wise a cyclist deaccelerates over intervals where deacceleration is unnecessary such as smooth turns or small grade angle intervals.

fields.name: avg_grit
fields.comment: The grit score estimates how challenging a route could be for a cyclist in terms of time spent going over sharp turns or large grade slopes.

fields.name: avg_flow
fields.comment: The flow score estimates how long distance wise a cyclist deaccelerates over intervals where deacceleration is unnecessary such as smooth turns or small grade angle intervals.

fields.name: total_fractional_ascent
fields.comment: fractional part of total_ascent

fields.name: total_fractional_descent
fields.comment: fractional part of total_descent

segment_file.comment: Summary of the unique segment and leaderboard information associated with a segment file. This message is used to compile a segment list file describing all segment files on a device. The segment list file is used when refreshing the contents of a segment file with the latest available leaderboard information.

fields.name: file_uuid
fields.comment: UUID of the segment file

fields.name: enabled
fields.comment: Enabled state of the segment file

fields.name: user_profile_primary_key
fields.comment: Primary key of the user that created the segment file

fields.name: leader_type
fields.comment: Leader type of each leader in the segment file

fields.name: leader_group_primary_key
fields.comment: Group primary key of each leader in the segment file

fields.name: leader_activity_id
fields.comment: Activity ID of each leader in the segment file

fields.name: leader_activity_id_string
fields.comment: String version of the activity ID of each leader in the segment file. 21 characters long for each ID, express in decimal

fields.name: default_race_leader
fields.comment: Index for the Leader Board entry selected as the default race participant

fields.name: num_valid_steps
fields.comment: number of valid steps

fields.name: wkt_description
fields.comment: Description of the workout

subFields.name: duration_step
subFields.comment: message_index of step to loop back to. Steps are assumed to be in the order by message_index. custom_name and intensity members are undefined for this duration type.

fields.name: manufacturer
fields.comment: Corresponds to file_id of scheduled workout / course.

fields.name: product
fields.comment: Corresponds to file_id of scheduled workout / course.

fields.name: serial_number
fields.comment: Corresponds to file_id of scheduled workout / course.

fields.name: time_created
fields.comment: Corresponds to file_id of scheduled workout / course.

fields.name: completed
fields.comment: TRUE if this activity has been started

fields.name: timer_time
fields.comment: Excludes pauses

fields.name: elapsed_time
fields.comment: Includes pauses

fields.name: active_met
fields.comment: ~4kJ per kcal, 0.25 allows max 16384 kcal

fields.name: user_profile_index
fields.comment: Associates this weight scale message to a user. This corresponds to the index of the user profile message in the weight scale file.

fields.name: user_profile_index
fields.comment: Associates this blood pressure message to a user. This corresponds to the index of the user profile message in the blood pressure file.

fields.name: local_timestamp
fields.comment: Use to convert activity timestamps to local time if device does not support time zone and daylight savings time correction.

fields.name: cycles_to_distance
fields.comment: Indexed by activity_type

fields.name: cycles_to_calories
fields.comment: Indexed by activity_type

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Must align to logging interval, for example, time must be 00:00:00 for daily log.

fields.name: device_index
fields.comment: Associates this data to device_info message. Not required for file with single device (sensor).

fields.name: calories
fields.comment: Accumulated total calories. Maintained by MonitoringReader for each activity_type. See SDK documentation

fields.name: distance
fields.comment: Accumulated distance. Maintained by MonitoringReader for each activity_type. See SDK documentation.

fields.name: cycles
fields.comment: Accumulated cycles. Maintained by MonitoringReader for each activity_type. See SDK documentation.

fields.name: local_timestamp
fields.comment: Must align to logging interval, for example, time must be 00:00:00 for daily log.

fields.name: temperature
fields.comment: Avg temperature during the logging interval ended at timestamp

fields.name: temperature_min
fields.comment: Min temperature during the logging interval ended at timestamp

fields.name: temperature_max
fields.comment: Max temperature during the logging interval ended at timestamp

fields.name: activity_time
fields.comment: Indexed using minute_activity_level enum

fields.name: current_activity_type_intensity
fields.comment: Indicates single type / intensity for duration since last monitoring message.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Must align to logging interval, for example, time must be 00:00:00 for daily log.

fields.name: resting_heart_rate
fields.comment: 7-day rolling average

fields.name: current_day_resting_heart_rate
fields.comment: RHR for today only. (Feeds into 7-day average)

fields.name: mode
fields.comment: Mode when data was captured

stress_level.comment: Value from 1 to 100 calculated by FirstBeat

fields.name: stress_level_time
fields.comment: Time stress score was calculated

fields.name: update_time
fields.comment: Time maxMET and vo2 were calculated

fields.name: calibrated_data
fields.comment: Indicates if calibrated data was used in the calculation

fields.name: hr_source
fields.comment: Indicates if the estimate was obtained using a chest strap or wrist heart rate

fields.name: speed_source
fields.comment: Indidcates if the estimate was obtained using onboard GPS or connected GPS

hsa_body_battery_data.comment: Body battery data used for HSA custom data logging

fields.name: processing_interval
fields.comment: Processing interval length in seconds

fields.name: level
fields.comment: Body battery level: [0,100] Blank: -16

fields.name: charged
fields.comment: Body battery charged value

fields.name: uncharged
fields.comment: Body battery uncharged value

fields.name: event_id
fields.comment: Event ID. Health SDK use only

hsa_accelerometer_data.comment: Raw accelerometer data used for HSA custom data logging

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Millisecond resolution of the timestamp

fields.name: sampling_interval
fields.comment: Sampling Interval in Milliseconds

fields.name: accel_x
fields.comment: X-Axis Measurement

fields.name: accel_y
fields.comment: Y-Axis Measurement

fields.name: accel_z
fields.comment: Z-Axis Measurement

fields.name: timestamp_32k
fields.comment: 32 kHz timestamp

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Millisecond resolution of the timestamp

fields.name: sampling_interval
fields.comment: Sampling Interval in 32 kHz timescale

fields.name: gyro_x
fields.comment: X-Axis Measurement

fields.name: gyro_y
fields.comment: Y-Axis Measurement

fields.name: gyro_z
fields.comment: Z-Axis Measurement

fields.name: timestamp_32k
fields.comment: 32 kHz timestamp

hsa_step_data.comment: User's current daily step data used for HSA custom data logging

fields.name: processing_interval
fields.comment: Processing interval length in seconds. File start: 0xFFFFFFEF File stop: 0xFFFFFFEE

fields.name: steps
fields.comment: Total step sum

hsa_spo2_data.comment: User's current SpO2 data used for HSA custom data logging

fields.name: processing_interval
fields.comment: Processing interval length in seconds

fields.name: reading_spo2
fields.comment: SpO2 Reading: [70,100] Blank: 240

fields.name: confidence
fields.comment: SpO2 Confidence: [0,254]

hsa_stress_data.comment: User's current stress data used for HSA custom data logging

fields.name: processing_interval
fields.comment: Processing interval length in seconds

fields.name: stress_level
fields.comment: Stress Level: [0,100] Off wrist: -1 Excess motion: -2 Not enough data: -3 Recovering from exercise: -4 Unidentified: -5 Blank: -16

hsa_respiration_data.comment: User's current respiration data used for HSA custom data logging

fields.name: processing_interval
fields.comment: Processing interval length in seconds

fields.name: respiration_rate
fields.comment: Breaths / min: [1,100] Invalid: 255 Excess motion: 254 Off wrist: 253 Not available: 252 Blank: 2.4

hsa_heart_rate_data.comment: User's current heart rate data used for HSA custom data logging

fields.name: processing_interval
fields.comment: Processing interval length in seconds

fields.name: status
fields.comment: Status of measurements in buffer - 0 indicates SEARCHING 1 indicates LOCKED

fields.name: heart_rate
fields.comment: Beats / min. Blank: 0

hsa_configuration_data.comment: Configuration data for HSA custom data logging

fields.name: timestamp
fields.comment: Encoded configuration data

fields.name: data
fields.comment: Encoded configuration data. Health SDK use only

fields.name: data_size
fields.comment: Size in bytes of data field

hsa_wrist_temperature_data.comment: Wrist temperature data used for HSA custom data logging

fields.name: processing_interval
fields.comment: Processing interval length in seconds

fields.name: value
fields.comment: Wrist temperature reading

fields.name: part_index
fields.comment: Sequence number of memo blocks

fields.name: memo
fields.comment: Deprecated. Use data field.

fields.name: mesg_num
fields.comment: Message Number of the parent message

fields.name: parent_index
fields.comment: Index of mesg that this glob is associated with.

fields.name: field_num
fields.comment: Field within the parent that this glob is associated with

fields.name: data
fields.comment: Block of utf8 bytes. Note, mutltibyte characters may be split across adjoining memo_glob messages.

fields.name: field_count
fields.comment: number of fields in screen

fields.name: avg_depth
fields.comment: 0 if above water

fields.name: max_depth
fields.comment: 0 if above water

fields.name: surface_interval
fields.comment: Time since end of last dive

fields.name: avg_pressure_sac
fields.comment: Average pressure-based surface air consumption

fields.name: avg_volume_sac
fields.comment: Average volumetric surface air consumption

fields.name: avg_rmv
fields.comment: Average respiratory minute volume

fields.name: descent_time
fields.comment: Time to reach deepest level stop

fields.name: ascent_time
fields.comment: Time after leaving bottom until reaching surface

fields.name: avg_ascent_rate
fields.comment: Average ascent rate, not including descents or stops

fields.name: avg_descent_rate
fields.comment: Average descent rate, not including ascents or stops

fields.name: max_ascent_rate
fields.comment: Maximum ascent rate

fields.name: max_descent_rate
fields.comment: Maximum descent rate

fields.name: hang_time
fields.comment: Time spent neither ascending nor descending

aad_accel_features.comment: Number of acclerometer zero crossings summed over the specified time interval

fields.name: time
fields.comment: Time interval length in seconds

fields.name: energy_total
fields.comment: Total accelerometer energy in the interval

fields.name: zero_cross_cnt
fields.comment: Count of zero crossings

fields.name: instance
fields.comment: Instance ID of zero crossing algorithm

fields.name: time_above_threshold
fields.comment: Total accelerometer time above threshold in the interval

fields.name: time
fields.comment: Time between beats

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Milliseconds past date_time

fields.name: time
fields.comment: Array of millisecond times between beats

fields.name: weekly_average
fields.comment: 7 day RMSSD average over sleep

fields.name: last_night_average
fields.comment: Last night RMSSD average over sleep

fields.name: last_night_5_min_high
fields.comment: 5 minute high RMSSD value over sleep

fields.name: baseline_low_upper
fields.comment: 3 week baseline, upper boundary of low HRV status

fields.name: baseline_balanced_lower
fields.comment: 3 week baseline, lower boundary of balanced HRV status

fields.name: baseline_balanced_upper
fields.comment: 3 week baseline, upper boundary of balanced HRV status

fields.name: value
fields.comment: 5 minute RMSSD

fields.name: timestamp_ms
fields.comment: Millisecond resolution of the timestamp

fields.name: data
fields.comment: 1 bit for gap indicator, 1 bit for quality indicator, and 14 bits for Beat-to-Beat interval values in whole-integer millisecond resolution

fields.name: time
fields.comment: Array of millisecond times between beats

fields.name: quality
fields.comment: 1 = high confidence. 0 = low confidence. N/A when gap = 1

fields.name: gap
fields.comment: 1 = gap (time represents ms gap length). 0 = BBI data

fields.name: respiration_rate
fields.comment: Breaths * 100 /min, -300 indicates invalid, -200 indicates large motion, -100 indicates off wrist

fields.name: combined_awake_score
fields.comment: Average of awake_time_score and awakenings_count_score. If valid: 0 (worst) to 100 (best). If unknown: FIT_UINT8_INVALID.

fields.name: awake_time_score
fields.comment: Score that evaluates the total time spent awake between sleep. If valid: 0 (worst) to 100 (best). If unknown: FIT_UINT8_INVALID.

fields.name: awakenings_count_score
fields.comment: Score that evaluates the number of awakenings that interrupt sleep. If valid: 0 (worst) to 100 (best). If unknown: FIT_UINT8_INVALID.

fields.name: deep_sleep_score
fields.comment: Score that evaluates the amount of deep sleep. If valid: 0 (worst) to 100 (best). If unknown: FIT_UINT8_INVALID.

fields.name: sleep_duration_score
fields.comment: Score that evaluates the quality of sleep based on sleep stages, heart-rate variability and possible awakenings during the night. If valid: 0 (worst) to 100 (best). If unknown: FIT_UINT8_INVALID.

fields.name: light_sleep_score
fields.comment: Score that evaluates the amount of light sleep. If valid: 0 (worst) to 100 (best). If unknown: FIT_UINT8_INVALID.

fields.name: overall_sleep_score
fields.comment: Total score that summarizes the overall quality of sleep, combining sleep duration and quality. If valid: 0 (worst) to 100 (best). If unknown: FIT_UINT8_INVALID.

fields.name: sleep_quality_score
fields.comment: Score that evaluates the quality of sleep based on sleep stages, heart-rate variability and possible awakenings during the night. If valid: 0 (worst) to 100 (best). If unknown: FIT_UINT8_INVALID.

fields.name: sleep_recovery_score
fields.comment: Score that evaluates stress and recovery during sleep. If valid: 0 (worst) to 100 (best). If unknown: FIT_UINT8_INVALID.

fields.name: rem_sleep_score
fields.comment: Score that evaluates the amount of REM sleep. If valid: 0 (worst) to 100 (best). If unknown: FIT_UINT8_INVALID.

fields.name: sleep_restlessness_score
fields.comment: Score that evaluates the amount of restlessness during sleep. If valid: 0 (worst) to 100 (best). If unknown: FIT_UINT8_INVALID.

fields.name: awakenings_count
fields.comment: The number of awakenings during sleep.

fields.name: interruptions_score
fields.comment: Score that evaluates the sleep interruptions. If valid: 0 (worst) to 100 (best). If unknown: FIT_UINT8_INVALID.

fields.name: average_stress_during_sleep
fields.comment: Excludes stress during awake periods in the sleep window

fields.name: update_timestamp
fields.comment: The timestamp representing when this nap event was last updated

fields.name: average_deviation
fields.comment: The average overnight deviation from baseline temperature in degrees C

fields.name: average_7_day_deviation
fields.comment: The average 7 day overnight deviation from baseline temperature in degrees C

fields.name: nightly_value
fields.comment: Final overnight temperature value
